reviews.review_title: Pay to play - with real money
reviews.review_description: Graphics look nice.  First thing i notice is shop where you have to buy credits with real money.  Hate these games where you have to buy credits with real money.  REFUND

Button NEXT does not work to me!
And it is important button in mission menu.
Why double click of triger is necessary to use in menu?
17th level is the worst, the most difficult.
From 25 to 60 level is the same way how to win it.
Strenght of base does not have any influence.
Here is many things to balance to better feeling from the game.
However I am looking forward to update.

developer_response.body: Brother, thank you very much for your feedback. We will continue to update the game to provide you with a better gaming experience.We look forward to your more detailed and authentic feedback going forward. We'll also be giving special gifts to our early adopters.

reviews.review_description: For me, it's simple and easy to pick up, though sometimes it comes down to how fast you can type...

developer_response.body: Yes, dear, it's casual and occasionally requires quick reflexes.We look forward to your more detailed and authentic feedback going forward. We'll also be giving special gifts to our early adopters.
